turns.query: Analyze rush hour pollution dynamics at Causeway Bay station (station_id: 17) on 2025-08-02, correlating 6-10 AM and 5-9 PM AQHI patterns with traffic congestion indices on Central-Wan Chai highway segments.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Station 17 is already resolved as "Causeway Bay" from the knowledge base
station_id = 17

# Fetch air quality data for station 17 on 2025-08-02
# Time window: 2025-08-02 00:00:00 to 2025-08-03 00:00:00 (exclusive)
aqhi_pm25_query = text("""
SELECT datetime, aqhi, pm2_5
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
AND datetime >= :start_time
AND datetime < :end_time
ORDER BY datetime
""")

aqhi_pm25_df = pd.read_sql(aqhi_pm25_query, engine, params={
    'station_id': station_id,
    'start_time': '2025-08-02 00:00:00',
    'end_time': '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
})

print(f"Air quality records for station {station_id} on 2025-08-02: {len(aqhi_pm25_df)} rows")
print(aqhi_pm25_df.head(10))

# Get station 17 coordinates for traffic lookup
station_coords_query = text("""
SELECT id, name_en, coordinate
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE id = :station_id
""")

station_info_df = pd.read_sql(station_coords_query, engine, params={'station_id': station_id})
print(f"\nStation info: {station_info_df[['id', 'name_en']].to_string()}")

# Get station coordinates as lat, lng
station_lat = station_info_df['coordinate'].values[0].y
station_lng = station_info_df['coordinate'].values[0].x
print(f"Station coordinates: lat={station_lat}, lng={station_lng}")

# Find nearby road segments (within 500m)
nearby_roads_query = text("""
SELECT rs.id as road_segment_id, rs.name_en, rs.road_segment_code,
       ST_Distance(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography) as distance_m
FROM road_segment rs
WHERE ST_DWithin(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography, 500)
ORDER BY distance_m
LIMIT 10
""")

nearby_roads_df = pd.read_sql(nearby_roads_query, engine, params={'lat': station_lat, 'lng': station_lng})
print(f"\nNearby road segments within 500m: {len(nearby_roads_df)}")
print(nearby_roads_df)

# Fetch traffic congestion data for nearby road segments
if len(nearby_roads_df) > 0:
    road_segment_ids = nearby_roads_df['road_segment_id'].tolist()
    traffic_query = text("""
    SELECT road_segment_id, datetime, congestion_index, congestion_status, speed
    FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
    WHERE road_segment_id = ANY(:road_segment_ids)
    AND datetime >= :start_time
    AND datetime < :end_time
    ORDER BY datetime, road_segment_id
    """)
    
    traffic_df = pd.read_sql(traffic_query, engine, params={
        'road_segment_ids': road_segment_ids,
        'start_time': '2025-08-02 00:00:00',
        'end_time': '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
    })
    print(f"\nTraffic records for nearby roads on 2025-08-02: {len(traffic_df)} rows")
    print(traffic_df.head(20))
else:
    traffic_df = pd.DataFrame()
    print("\nNo nearby road segments found, traffic data unavailable")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

station_id = 17

# Fix: Extract coordinates using ST_X and ST_Y in SQL
station_coords_query = text("""
SELECT id, name_en, 
       ST_X(coordinate::geometry) as lng, 
       ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) as lat
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE id = :station_id
""")

station_info_df = pd.read_sql(station_coords_query, engine, params={'station_id': station_id})
print(f"Station info: {station_info_df[['id', 'name_en']].to_string()}")
station_lat = station_info_df['lat'].values[0]
station_lng = station_info_df['lng'].values[0]
print(f"Station coordinates: lat={station_lat}, lng={station_lng}")

# Re-fetch air quality data (already have it but let's confirm)
aqhi_pm25_query = text("""
SELECT datetime, aqhi, pm2_5
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = :station_id
AND datetime >= :start_time
AND datetime < :end_time
ORDER BY datetime
""")

aqhi_pm25_df = pd.read_sql(aqhi_pm25_query, engine, params={
    'station_id': station_id,
    'start_time': '2025-08-02 00:00:00',
    'end_time': '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
})

print(f"\nAir quality records: {len(aqhi_pm25_df)} rows")
print(aqhi_pm25_df)

# Compute required statistics
mean_pm2_5_station17 = aqhi_pm25_df['pm2_5'].mean()
max_pm2_5_station17 = aqhi_pm25_df['pm2_5'].max()
mean_aqhi_station17 = aqhi_pm25_df['aqhi'].mean()
max_aqhi_station17 = aqhi_pm25_df['aqhi'].max()

print(f"\nComputed statistics for station {station_id} on 2025-08-02:")
print(f"Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_station17:.2f}")
print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_station17:.2f}")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_station17:.2f}")
print(f"Max AQHI: {max_aqhi_station17:.2f}")

# Find nearby road segments (within 500m)
nearby_roads_query = text("""
SELECT rs.id as road_segment_id, rs.name_en, rs.road_segment_code,
       ST_Distance(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography) as distance_m
FROM road_segment rs
WHERE ST_DWithin(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography, 500)
ORDER BY distance_m
LIMIT 10
""")

nearby_roads_df = pd.read_sql(nearby_roads_query, engine, params={'lat': station_lat, 'lng': station_lng})
print(f"\nNearby road segments within 500m: {len(nearby_roads_df)}")
print(nearby_roads_df)

# Fetch traffic congestion data for nearby road segments
if len(nearby_roads_df) > 0:
    road_segment_ids = nearby_roads_df['road_segment_id'].tolist()
    traffic_query = text("""
    SELECT road_segment_id, datetime, congestion_index, congestion_status, speed
    FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
    WHERE road_segment_id = ANY(:road_segment_ids)
    AND datetime >= :start_time
    AND datetime < :end_time
    ORDER BY datetime, road_segment_id
    """)
    
    traffic_df = pd.read_sql(traffic_query, engine, params={
        'road_segment_ids': road_segment_ids,
        'start_time': '2025-08-02 00:00:00',
        'end_time': '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
    })
    print(f"\nTraffic records for nearby roads on 2025-08-02: {len(traffic_df)} rows")
    print(traffic_df.head(20))
    
    # Compute traffic statistics
    if len(traffic_df) > 0:
        mean_congestion_index = traffic_df['congestion_index'].mean()
        max_congestion_index = traffic_df['congestion_index'].max()
        mean_speed = traffic_df['speed'].mean()
        print(f"\nTraffic statistics (nearby roads):")
        print(f"Mean congestion index: {mean_congestion_index:.2f}")
        print(f"Max congestion index: {max_congestion_index:.2f}")
        print(f"Mean speed: {mean_speed:.2f} km/h")
else:
    traffic_df = pd.DataFrame()
    print("\nNo nearby road segments found, traffic data unavailable")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Reuse previously computed station coordinates
station_lat = 22.28013296
station_lng = 114.1850901

# Fix road segment query to join with street table for name_en
nearby_roads_query = text("""
SELECT rs.id as road_segment_id, s.name_en, rs.road_segment_code,
       ST_Distance(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography) as distance_m
FROM road_segment rs
JOIN street s ON rs.street_id = s.id
WHERE ST_DWithin(rs.geometry::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(:lng, :lat), 4326)::geography, 500)
ORDER BY distance_m
LIMIT 10
""")

nearby_roads_df = pd.read_sql(nearby_roads_query, engine, params={'lat': station_lat, 'lng': station_lng})
print(f"Nearby road segments within 500m: {len(nearby_roads_df)}")
print(nearby_roads_df)

# Fetch traffic congestion data for nearby road segments
traffic_df = pd.DataFrame()
if len(nearby_roads_df) > 0:
    road_segment_ids = nearby_roads_df['road_segment_id'].tolist()
    traffic_query = text("""
    SELECT road_segment_id, datetime, congestion_index, congestion_status, speed
    FROM hourly_road_segment_traffic
    WHERE road_segment_id = ANY(:road_segment_ids)
    AND datetime >= :start_time
    AND datetime < :end_time
    ORDER BY datetime, road_segment_id
    """)
    
    traffic_df = pd.read_sql(traffic_query, engine, params={
        'road_segment_ids': road_segment_ids,
        'start_time': '2025-08-02 00:00:00',
        'end_time': '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
    })
    print(f"\nTraffic records for nearby roads on 2025-08-02: {len(traffic_df)} rows")
    print(traffic_df.head(20))
    
    if len(traffic_df) > 0:
        mean_congestion_index = traffic_df['congestion_index'].mean()
        max_congestion_index = traffic_df['congestion_index'].max()
        mean_speed = traffic_df['speed'].mean()
        print(f"\nTraffic statistics (nearby roads):")
        print(f"Mean congestion index: {mean_congestion_index:.2f}")
        print(f"Max congestion index: {max_congestion_index:.2f}")
        print(f"Mean speed: {mean_speed:.2f} km/h")
else:
    print("\nNo nearby road segments found within 500m.")

# Stage findings in descriptively-named variables for synthesis agent
mean_pm2_5_station17 = aqhi_pm2_5_df['pm2_5'].mean()
max_pm2_5_station17 = aqhi_pm2_5_df['pm2_5'].max()

max_aqhi_station17 = aqhi_pm2_5_df['aqhi'].max()

# Print final air quality statistics for station 17 on 2025-08-02
print("\n--- Final Air Quality Statistics for Station 17 (Causeway Bay) on 2025-08-02 ---")
print(f"Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_station17:.2f}")
print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_station17:.2f}")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_station17:.2f}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Query data for station 17 (Causeway Bay) on 2025-08-02 for the two time windows
# 6-10 AM: 06:00 to 10:00 (start-inclusive, end-exclusive)
# 5-9 PM: 17:00 to 21:00 (start-inclusive, end-exclusive)

query = """
SELECT datetime, pm2_5, aqhi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 17
AND datetime >= '2025-08-02 06:00:00'
AND datetime < '2025-08-02 21:00:00'
ORDER BY datetime
"""

df = pd.read_sql(text(query), engine)
df['datetime'] = pd.to_datetime(df['datetime'])
df['hour'] = df['datetime'].dt.hour

print("Data for station 17 on 2025-08-02 (06:00 to 21:00):")
print(df[['datetime', 'hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi']].to_string())
print(f"\nTotal records: {len(df)}")

# Filter for 6-10 AM window (06:00 to 10:00)
df_6am_10am = df[(df['hour'] >= 6) & (df['hour'] < 10)].copy()
print(f"\n6-10 AM window records: {len(df_6am_10am)}")
print(df_6am_10am[['datetime', 'hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi']].to_string())

# Filter for 5-9 PM window (17:00 to 21:00)
df_5pm_9pm = df[(df['hour'] >= 17) & (df['hour'] < 21)].copy()
print(f"\n5-9 PM window records: {len(df_5pm_9pm)}")
print(df_5pm_9pm[['datetime', 'hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi']].to_string())

# Compute statistics for 6-10 AM window
if len(df_6am_10am) > 0:
    mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = float(df_6am_10am['pm2_5'].mean())
    max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = float(df_6am_10am['pm2_5'].max())
    mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = float(df_6am_10am['aqhi'].mean())
    max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = float(df_6am_10am['aqhi'].max())
else:
    mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = None
    max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = None
    mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = None
    max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = None

# Compute statistics for 5-9 PM window
if len(df_5pm_9pm) > 0:
    mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = float(df_5pm_9pm['pm2_5'].mean())
    max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = float(df_5pm_9pm['pm2_5'].max())
    mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = float(df_5pm_9pm['aqhi'].mean())
    max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = float(df_5pm_9pm['aqhi'].max())
else:
    mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = None
    max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = None
    mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = None
    max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = None

print("\n=== 6-10 AM Window Statistics ===")
print(f"Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17}")
print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17}")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17}")
print(f"Max AQHI: {max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17}")

print("\n=== 5-9 PM Window Statistics ===")
print(f"Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17}")
print(f"Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17}")
print(f"Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17}")
print(f"Max AQHI: {max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17}")

# Examine existing traffic and pollution data for rush hours
print("=== Traffic Data Structure ===")
print(traffic_df.columns.tolist())
print(traffic_df.head())
print(f"\nTraffic data shape: {traffic_df.shape}")

print("\n=== Morning Rush Hour (6am-10am) Pollution Data ===")
print(df_6am_10am.columns.tolist())
print(df_6am_10am.head())
print(f"\nMorning rush hour data shape: {df_6am_10am.shape}")

print("\n=== Evening Rush Hour (5pm-9pm) Pollution Data ===")
print(df_5pm_9pm.columns.tolist())
print(df_5pm_9pm.head())
print(f"\nEvening rush hour data shape: {df_5pm_9pm.shape}")

print("\n=== Existing Rush Hour Statistics ===")
print(f"Morning PM2.5 - Mean: {mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17}, Max: {max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17}")
print(f"Morning AQHI - Mean: {mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17}, Max: {max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17}")
print(f"Evening PM2.5 - Mean: {mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17}, Max: {max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17}")
print(f"Evening AQHI - Mean: {mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17}, Max: {max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17}")
print(f"Traffic - Mean Congestion Index: {mean_congestion_index}, Max: {max_congestion_index}")
print(f"Traffic - Mean Speed: {mean_speed}")

# Check traffic data distribution across road segments and times
print("=== Traffic Data by Hour ===")
traffic_df['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(traffic_df['datetime']).dt.hour
hourly_traffic = traffic_df.groupby('hour').agg(
    mean_congestion=('congestion_index', 'mean'),
    max_congestion=('congestion_index', 'max'),
    mean_speed=('speed', 'mean'),
    num_segments=('road_segment_id', 'count')
).reset_index()
print(hourly_traffic)

print("\n=== Traffic Data by Road Segment ===")
print(f"Number of unique road segments: {traffic_df['road_segment_id'].nunique()}")
print(f"Road segment IDs: {traffic_df['road_segment_id'].unique()[:10]}...")

# Align traffic with pollution data for morning rush hour
print("\n=== Morning Rush Hour (6am-10am) ===")
morning_traffic = traffic_df[traffic_df['hour'].isin([6, 7, 8, 9])]
morning_agg = morning_traffic.groupby('hour').agg(
    mean_congestion=('congestion_index', 'mean'),
    max_congestion=('congestion_index', 'max'),
    mean_speed=('speed', 'mean')
).reset_index()
print(morning_agg)

# Align traffic with pollution data for evening rush hour
print("\n=== Evening Rush Hour (5pm-9pm) ===")
evening_traffic = traffic_df[traffic_df['hour'].isin([17, 18, 19, 20])]
evening_agg = evening_traffic.groupby('hour').agg(
    mean_congestion=('congestion_index', 'mean'),
    max_congestion=('congestion_index', 'max'),
    mean_speed=('speed', 'mean')
).reset_index()
print(evening_agg)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Extract hour from datetime for traffic and pollution data
traffic_df['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(traffic_df['datetime']).dt.hour
df_6am_10am['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(df_6am_10am['datetime']).dt.hour
df_5pm_9pm['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(df_5pm_9pm['datetime']).dt.hour

# Aggregate traffic metrics by hour (mean across all nearby road segments)
traffic_hourly = traffic_df.groupby('hour').agg(
    mean_congestion=('congestion_index', 'mean'),
    max_congestion=('congestion_index', 'max'),
    mean_speed=('speed', 'mean')
).reset_index()

# Align morning rush hour data
morning_merged = df_6am_10am.merge(traffic_hourly, on='hour', how='left')
print("=== Morning Rush Hour (6am-10am) Aligned Data ===")
print(morning_merged[['hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi', 'mean_congestion', 'mean_speed']])

# Compute Pearson correlations for morning
if len(morning_merged) > 2:
    m_corr_pm25_cong = morning_merged['pm2_5'].corr(morning_merged['mean_congestion'])
    m_corr_aqhi_cong = morning_merged['aqhi'].corr(morning_merged['mean_congestion'])
    m_corr_pm25_speed = morning_merged['pm2_5'].corr(morning_merged['mean_speed'])
    print(f"\nMorning Rush Hour Correlations (n={len(morning_merged)}):")
    print(f"PM2.5 vs Congestion Index: {m_corr_pm25_cong:.3f}")
    print(f"AQHI vs Congestion Index: {m_corr_aqhi_cong:.3f}")
    print(f"PM2.5 vs Mean Speed: {m_corr_pm25_speed:.3f}")
else:
    print("\nInsufficient data points for morning correlation.")

# Align evening rush hour data
evening_merged = df_5pm_9pm.merge(traffic_hourly, on='hour', how='left')
print("\n=== Evening Rush Hour (5pm-9pm) Aligned Data ===")
print(evening_merged[['hour', 'pm2_5', 'aqhi', 'mean_congestion', 'mean_speed']])

# Compute Pearson correlations for evening
if len(evening_merged) > 2:
    e_corr_pm25_cong = evening_merged['pm2_5'].corr(evening_merged['mean_congestion'])
    e_corr_aqhi_cong = evening_merged['aqhi'].corr(evening_merged['mean_congestion'])
    e_corr_pm25_speed = evening_merged['pm2_5'].corr(evening_merged['mean_speed'])
    print(f"\nEvening Rush Hour Correlations (n={len(evening_merged)}):")
    print(f"PM2.5 vs Congestion Index: {e_corr_pm25_cong:.3f}")
    print(f"AQHI vs Congestion Index: {e_corr_aqhi_cong:.3f}")
    print(f"PM2.5 vs Mean Speed: {e_corr_pm25_speed:.3f}")
else:
    print("\nInsufficient data points for evening correlation.")

# Reuse the already-computed variables from the shared runtime
mean_pm2_5 = float(mean_pm2_5_station17_20250802)
max_pm2_5 = float(max_pm2_5_station17_20250802)
mean_aqhi = float(mean_aqhi_station17_20250802)
max_aqhi = float(max_aqhi_station17_20250802)

# Print the assigned values for confirmation
print(f"mean_pm2_5: {mean_pm2_5}")
print(f"max_pm2_5: {max_pm2_5}")
print(f"mean_aqhi: {mean_aqhi}")
print(f"max_aqhi: {max_aqhi}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Step 1: Query air quality data for station 17 on 2025-08-02
aqhi_pm2_5_query = text("""
SELECT datetime, aqhi, pm2_5, pm10, no2
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 17
AND datetime >= '2025-08-02 00:00:00'
AND datetime < '2025-08-03 00:00:00'
ORDER BY datetime
""")
aqhi_pm2_5_df = pd.read_sql(aqhi_pm2_5_query, engine)

# Compute full day statistics
mean_pm2_5 = aqhi_pm2_5_df['pm2_5'].mean()
max_pm2_5 = aqhi_pm2_5_df['pm2_5'].max()
mean_aqhi = aqhi_pm2_5_df['aqhi'].mean()
max_aqhi = aqhi_pm2_5_df['aqhi'].max()

print(f"Full day 2025-08-02 - Station 17 (Causeway Bay):")
print(f"  Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5:.2f}")
print(f"  Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5:.2f}")
print(f"  Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi:.2f}")
print(f"  Max AQHI: {max_aqhi:.2f}")
print(f"  Number of readings: {len(aqhi_pm2_5_df)}")
print()

# Step 2: Filter for morning rush hour (6-10 AM)
df_6am_10am = aqhi_pm2_5_df[
    (aqhi_pm2_5_df['datetime'].dt.hour >= 6) & 
    (aqhi_pm2_5_df['datetime'].dt.hour < 10)
]
mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = df_6am_10am['pm2_5'].mean()
max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17 = df_6am_10am['pm2_5'].max()
mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = df_6am_10am['aqhi'].mean()
max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17 = df_6am_10am['aqhi'].max()

print(f"Morning Rush Hour (6-10 AM) - Station 17:")
print(f"  Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_6am_10am_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_6am_10am_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Max AQHI: {max_aqhi_6am_10am_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Number of readings: {len(df_6am_10am)}")
print()

# Step 3: Filter for evening rush hour (5-9 PM)
df_5pm_9pm = aqhi_pm2_5_df[
    (aqhi_pm2_5_df['datetime'].dt.hour >= 17) & 
    (aqhi_pm2_5_df['datetime'].dt.hour < 21)
]
mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = df_5pm_9pm['pm2_5'].mean()
max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17 = df_5pm_9pm['pm2_5'].max()
mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = df_5pm_9pm['aqhi'].mean()
max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17 = df_5pm_9pm['aqhi'].max()

print(f"Evening Rush Hour (5-9 PM) - Station 17:")
print(f"  Mean PM2.5: {mean_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Max PM2.5: {max_pm2_5_5pm_9pm_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Mean AQHI: {mean_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Max AQHI: {max_aqhi_5pm_9pm_station17:.2f}")
print(f"  Number of readings: {len(df_5pm_9pm)}")
print()

# Step 4: Get station coordinates for spatial queries
station_coords_query = text("""
SELECT id, name_en, ST_X(coordinate::geometry) as lng, ST_Y(coordinate::geometry) as lat
FROM air_quality_station
WHERE id = 17
""")
station_info_df = pd.read_sql(station_coords_query, engine)
station_lat = station_info_df['lat'].values[0]
station_lng = station_info_df['lng'].values[0]
print(f"Station 17 (Causeway Bay) coordinates: lat={station_lat:.6f}, lng={station_lng:.6f}")
